name: Pfizer Inc.
description: Pfizer Inc. is a leading global biopharmaceutical company dedicated to discovering, developing, and manufacturing innovative medicines and vaccines. With a rich history dating back to 1849, the company focuses on addressing some of the world's most challenging health conditions across areas such as oncology, internal medicine, inflammation, and immunology. Pfizer leverages advanced scientific research and a robust clinical pipeline to deliver breakthrough therapies that improve patient outcomes. Headquartered in the United States, the company remains committed to global health equity, ethical business practices, and the continuous pursuit of medical advancements to extend and enhance human life.
